changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV_ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[]', '[{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["username","accountNumber","subNumber","accessToken"],"properties":{"username":{"type":"string","description":"username"},"accountNumber":{"type":"string","description":"accountNumber"},"subNumber":{"type":"string","description":"subNumber"},"accessToken":{"type":"string","description":"accessToken"}}}}}}]', '{"200":{"data":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string"}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'delete unsubscribe to market leader', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_DELETE_UNSUBSCRIBE';

INSERT IGNORE INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV_MTS_COPY_TRADING_API_DELETE_UNSUBSCRIBE' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';
